title: Ginger Ray Christmas DIY Make Your Own Advent Calendar Kit x 24 Hessian Stockings - Red & Gold
seller_info_text: Dispatched from and sold by Topzilly.
features: For an exciting countdown to Christmas use our hessian stocking advent calendar
Fill with a treat or small gift for a fun countdown to the big day!
Each pack contains 24 stockings and pegs, 3m length string
Part of the Ginger Ray Let It Snow range
